name: Reverse Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cream together the butter, sugar, and salt until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the vanilla extract and eggs.
4. Gradually beat in the flour and baking soda.
5. Mix in the melted semisweet chocolate and coarsely chopped white chocolate and macadamia nuts.
6. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 15 minutes.
